name: frequency-schedule-field
title: Frequency Schedule Field
description: Dose frequency (OD/BD/TDS/QDS/custom) as an editable list of dose times.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the frequency and concrete times.

clinicalNotes: Render and store times in the patient's local timezone explicitly. Some frequencies imply clinically meaningful spacing (Q8H is not the same as TDS-with-meals), so the chosen frequency is kept alongside the concrete times rather than discarded once times exist. Presets seed a sensible default schedule the user can then adjust; "custom" lets times be placed and removed directly. Ties into the platform's multi-dose medication times[] model.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes toggle-group + input(type=time) + field + button + tooltip. Emits times: string[]. Frequency abbreviations carry a tooltip with the full meaning (aria-label as fallback).
